error_signature: Package n8n-nodes-htmlcsstopdf is not vetted for installation
title: Community node installation not vetted error
symptom: When attempting to install the community node 'HTML to PDF', n8n throws an error stating that the package is not vetted for installation.
not_this_if: Installation of other verified nodes works without issue
root_cause: The error occurs because the installation process checks if the community node has been vetted and finds that it either does not exist in the vetted list or lacks a checksum. This can happen if the node is not properly registered or if there is a misconfiguration in the community package settings.
fix_steps: Verify that the community node is correctly registered and vetted.
Check the configuration settings for community packages in your n8n setup.
Try installing other verified nodes to confirm the issue is isolated to this specific node.
agent_instruction: Check the registration and configuration of the community node and attempt installation again.
